mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_members ( room_id, user_id, role, custom_room_name, custom_room_thumbnail, custom_room_back_ground, member_status ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{customRoomName}, #{customRoomThumbnail}, #{customRoomBackground}, #{memberStatus} )
mapper.select: SELECT room_id FROM chat_rooms WHERE room_id = #{roomId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT room_notice_id FROM chat_room_notices WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND room_notice_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY room_notice_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_room_notices ( room_id, room_notice_action, room_notice_type, source_message_id, room_notice_contents, room_notice_status, created_by, created_at ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, 'CREATE', #{roomNoticeType}, #{sourceMessageId}, #{roomNoticeContents}, 'ACTIVE', #{requesterUserId}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE chat_room_notices SET room_notice_action = 'UPDATE',
room_notice_type = #{roomNoticeType},
source_message_id = #{sourceMessageId},
room_notice_contents = #{roomNoticeContents}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND room_notice_id = #{targetRoomNoticeId} AND room_notice_status != 'DELETED'

UPDATE chat_room_notices SET room_notice_action = 'INACTIVATE', room_notice_status = 'INACTIVE', inactivated_at = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND room_notice_status = 'ACTIVE' AND created_by = #{requesterUserId}

UPDATE chat_room_notices SET room_notice_action = 'INACTIVATE', room_notice_status = 'INACTIVE', inactivated_at = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND room_notice_id = #{roomNoticeId} AND room_notice_status = 'ACTIVE'

UPDATE chat_room_notices SET room_notice_action = 'REACTIVATE', room_notice_status = 'ACTIVE', reactivated_at = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND room_notice_id = #{roomNoticeId} AND room_notice_status = 'INACTIVE'

UPDATE chat_room_notices SET room_notice_action = 'DELETE', room_notice_status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = NOW() WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND room_notice_id = #{roomNoticeId} AND room_notice_status != 'DELETED'
mapper.select: SELECT rn.room_notice_id AS room_notice_id, rn.room_id AS room_id, rn.room_notice_action AS room_notice_action, rn.room_notice_type AS room_notice_type, rn.room_notice_contents AS room_notice_contents, rn.room_notice_status AS room_notice_status, u.public_id AS requester_public_id, CASE rn.room_notice_action WHEN 'CREATE' THEN rn.created_at WHEN 'UPDATE' THEN rn.updated_at WHEN 'INACTIVATE' THEN rn.inactivated_at WHEN 'REACTIVATE' THEN rn.reactivated_at WHEN 'DELETE' THEN rn.deleted_at END AS last_applied_at FROM chat_room_notices rn JOIN users u ON u.user_id = rn.created_by WHERE rn.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY rn.room_notice_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT rn.room_notice_id AS room_notice_id, rn.room_id AS room_id, rn.room_notice_action AS room_notice_action, rn.room_notice_type AS room_notice_type, rn.room_notice_contents AS room_notice_contents, rn.room_notice_status AS room_notice_status, u.public_id AS requester_public_id, CASE rn.room_notice_action WHEN 'CREATE' THEN rn.created_at WHEN 'UPDATE' THEN rn.updated_at WHEN 'INACTIVATE' THEN rn.inactivated_at WHEN 'REACTIVATE' THEN rn.reactivated_at WHEN 'DELETE' THEN rn.deleted_at END AS last_applied_at FROM chat_room_notices rn JOIN users u ON u.user_id = rn.created_by WHERE rn.room_id = #{roomId} AND rn.room_notice_id = #{roomNoticeId}
